# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(name: 'Custom Build Discarder', strategy: com.cloudbees.groovy.run.DiscardCause.FAILURE)
    }

    parameters {
        choice name: 'ENV', choices: ['dev', 'qa', 'prod']
        string(name: 'COMMAND', defaultValue: '')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STEP', defaultValue: '')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh "echo Building the project..."
                sh "${params.COMMAND}"
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                if (params.TEST_SCRIPT != '') {
                    sh "echo Running test script..."
                    sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                } else {
                    echo 'No test script provided.'
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                if (params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP != '') {
                    sh "echo Deploying the project..."
                    sh "${params.DEPLOYMENT_STEP}"
                } else {
                    echo 'No deployment step provided.'
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
